title: gibbsReactor operation
description: Gibbs reactor: equilibrium composition by minimising the total Gibbs free energy of the species mixture, subject to atom-balance constraints (element conservation).  Lagrangian formulation, least-squares-seeded NewtonND, three selectable `model` paths: elementPotential (gas / 1 ideal condensable), reactiveFlash (multi-condensable + NRTL), directMin (multi-start Nelder-Mead).  The user lists the atomic elements considered + the candidate species with their atom counts; the simulator finds the equilibrium mixture.

T.title: Operating temperature
T.description: Temperature at which the equilibrium is evaluated.  For an adiabatic Gibbs reactor (energy balance), wrap the unit in a DesignSpec that varies $T to enforce H_out = H_in.

P.title: Operating pressure
P.description: Pressure at which the equilibrium is evaluated.  Enters via the ideal-gas chemical-potential term mu = mu_pure(T) + R T ln(y_i P / 1 bar).

elements.title: Atomic elements
elements.description: Chemical elements considered in the atom-balance constraints (one constraint per element).  Each species declares its atom counts in this same order.

species.title: Candidate species
species.description: Species present in the equilibrium mixture, each with its atom counts (one number per element listed above).

name.title: Component name (must be in the thermoPackage)
